app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: AI-ishkwaaj, gaa-mamaanjiwebinigang wiindamaagewin waawiindamaagozid gaa-waabandang ji-ozhibii'igeyan maamiminjiminaagozid odaabii'iwewin
search.label: Wiindamaw gaa-waabandaman
search.placeholder: gaa-teg: modal giibiiganaagan, gaawiin inaabiwin wiindamaagewin
search.hint_submit: Ozhibii'an wiindamaagewin mii Nanda-wiindamaage gaye Enter.
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: Gaawiin waabandanziin '{query}'. Gidaa-doodaan wiindamaagewin inini-mazina'igan, ozhibii'igaans, gemaa kozhiins.
results.no_results_body: Gidaa-doodaan wiindamaagewin inini-mazina'igan (gaa-enind 'button'), ozhibii'igaans (gaa-enind 'input'), gemaa kozhiins.
detail.refine_hint_ai: Wiindamaw aaniin aazhog miinawaa AI gaa-bi-azhigiiwenh biindige-atoowi giin ozhi'igaazon gemaa mazina'iganan. Gashkichige AI gidinigaan gemaa bookondaan omaa
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Ozhibii'an akawe gaye wiindamaaw. IA giizhiitaa
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Waawiindamaazowin: "Ozhibii'igewinan gaa-chi-waabishkiziwaad aanind apii ozhibii'igewinan ani-miskamaawaad Onboarding Flow ekidowin. Aadizookaanan da-izhi-miskaamagad adaawenang chi-izhiwebak endaso-izhi-waabishkiziwaad."
detail.rewrite_aria: Asaan mazinaigan miinawaa gashkichige gaa-miskaan mazina'iganan AI-ing
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: Mazinaigan gaawiin gegoo. Gaawiin gegoo copy.
detail.confirm_reset_body: Gii-ozhitooyan chi-aanzibiiyaan omaa mazina'iganing. Biinaa'igewin ga-nagadanaan gakina gaa-ozhitooyan.
settings.heading: Mazinaigan
settings.ai_enable_desc: Ozhibii'igaazowag gaa-wiindamaagozid miinawaa/gemaa Gaa-pi-izhi-naanaagadawendang ji-naadamaagoziyan ezhichigeyan AI Ogimaakiwin gaa-pi-izhi-wiindamaagozid.
settings.privacy_body_1: Noongom, miinan gii-biindaakojigewin gaa-ininamaagoziyan giizhi-mazina'iganing localStorage aabajitooyin. Gaawiin wiikaa giizhibaatoon dash aabijitoowinan. Gaa-biindaakojigewin mazina'igan: wiiyawing, anishinaabemowin, mashkimod naanaagadawendamowin, Live Search naanaagadawendamowin, AI mashkimod wiindamaagewin, API ozhibii'igewin, giizhibaa-ozhibii'igewin, anang-ozhibii'igewin, onjibiindaakojigewin, gii-ozhibii'igaazowin, bizhiw gaa-miskamang, gaa-pi-ozhibii'igaazowin, gaa-inaabiwin miinawaa giizhi gaa-pi-miskaman.
settings.privacy_body_2: API ozhibii'igewin gii-biindaakojigewin giizhi-mazina'iganing miinawaa gaa-pi-izhi-giizhibaatood AI mashkimod gaa-pi-izhi-wiindamaagozid. Gaawiin wiikaa waabandamimin. Giin daa-giiwenimaa aaniin gegoo AI naanaagadawendamowin, gemaa gaa-pi-izhi-biindaakoozhiyaan giizhi-mazina'iganing gaa-pi-izhi-wiindamaagozid.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI ozhibii'igaazowinan miinawaa mamaajitoowin gaa-pi-izhi-AI ozhibii'igaazowinan miinawaa daa-pi-izhi-waabishkaad. Gaawiin wiikaa gaa-pi-izhi-naaniibawiyang gaa-pi-ozhibii'igaazowin, gaa-pi-ozhibii'igewin, gemaa gaa-inaabiwin ozhibii'igewin.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion azhigookiid. Biminizha'igewin gaa-izhi-confetti gaawiin pi-izhichigesii. Ji-oshki-azhigookiiying, azhigookii reduced motion gidOS wiijiindaasoowin azhigoozid.
notfound.heading: 404: Gaa-wanenimigowizid Zaaga'iganing
notfound.body: Omaa makakiing gaawiin odazhindanziin. Giiwe endazhi-maajitaayin.
party.announce_full: Miinaawaa-niimi'iding giizhiitaa! Ozhibii'an Comic Sans. Tema gii-izhi. Konfetti pantalla-ing. Ratón cursor magic.
party.announce_reduced: Miinaawaa-niimi'iding giizhiitaa! Ozhibii'an Comic Sans. Tema gii-izhi. Ratón cursor magic. Konfetti gaawiin.
kofi.title: Ko-fi widget
about.what_body: Mii mazina'iganing oshkibimaadiziiwinan gaa-pi-izhi-nandawindamaading ji-naadamaagoziying noongo niizhing. Naanaagadawendan gaa-waabandaman, mii dash oshkibimaadiziiwin gaa-wiijiindaasoying, miinawaa maajiigin giizhibizoowin.
about.what_wcag: Owe mazina'igan azhigwa WCAG 2.2 Level A miinawaa AA, mii gaa-anokiitooyan akina wiijiindaasowinini miinawaa gii-ozhibii'igewin ji-naagadawendaagwak. Apii azhigwa Level AAA Success Criteria wiijiindaasowin mii dash azhigookiiwin gaa-pi-izhi-nandawindamaading waabishkizi gaa-izhi-maazhi'aawin.
about.step_1_body: Ozhibii'an gaa-waabandaman — component, elemento, aaniin ezhi-ikidoying.
about.step_2_body: Aabaji'an Priority Up/Priority Down mitigomizii-ishkwaandem mii dash waaboozid. Anangoons maajii-naagwad. Wiindamaagewin bi-bookondaan.
about.step_4_body: Asaan onjibaa-mazina'igan (e.g. "Global:") gemaa aabaji'an AI wiidookaazowin waabishkizi-wiindamaagewin.
about.feature_ai_body: Anokii AI ji-oshki-maazhi'aad oshkibimaadiziiwin gidebwewin azhigwa gidinaajimowin. Biindigen gidaapi API mazina'igan Anthropic, OpenAI, gemaa Google. Mii eta go gidaapi-mazina'iganing miinawaa gaawiin wiindamagozisiimin. Azhigoozid
about.feature_languages_body: Owe mazina'igan azhigwa 50 ikidowinan gaa-pimi-izhaawad miinawaa RTL wiijiindaasoowin ji-ozhibii'igeng ikidowinan. Nindinimaagoz miinawaa nindaa-gagwe-wiindamaagoz ikidowinan, aadizookewin, miinawaa izhitwaawin. Akina owe ikidowinan gii-pi-biindigen mii eta go waabishkizi naanaagadawendaagwak, gii-pi-maazhi'aa AI, mii dash baa-naanaagadawendaagwak ji-aazhitooyan ozhibii'igewin. Wiijiindaason ji-nagishkaawin. Azhigookii
about.feature_a11y_body: Gii-ozhiitaa WCAG 2.2 azhigwa. Azhigookii wiijiindaasoowin naanaagadawendaagwak, pi-anokiiwin oshki-ikidowinan, akina mazina'igan biminizha'igewin, bimaadiziwin gaa-pi-izhi-bimosed, miinawaa gichi-waasigamaa-ozhaawashkwaa ikidowinan.
about.coming_auth: Google aaniin GitHub sign in devices.
about.coming_custom: Biindigan mii dash aazhogiizhigan giinwenzh ozhibii'igewinan, biindaakojigewin gaa-dazhiikigaadeg ginwaabimowin.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: API keys dóó settings mii dash. Giin gaawiin.
settings.unsaved_body: Ginamaw aazhitoowin gaawiin gii-maajiiginzii. Aaniin dash gidaa-izhichigem?
settings.language_changed_announce: Ikidowin: Gii-Aazhitood, biindigen Save doodoowinan ji-wiijiindaasoying
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Ganawetaw gaa-wiindamaagewin miinawaa gaa-izhichigewin ji-aabajichigaazod chi-mashkimoding spreadsheet gemaa ozhibii'iganing.
detail.revise_error_body: Aaniin gii-pi-izhichige gashkichigewin. Ozhi'igan Asaan & Gashkichige Gaa-Miskaan wii-nagishkaan.
settings.api_key_error: Ozhi'igaazowinan: API gidinigaan ayaamagad AI Wiidookaazowin biminizha'igaazod.
error.heading: Aaniin Gii-Pi-Izhichige
error.body: Ozhibii'igewin-ganawendamowin gaawiin gii-biindaakozisii. Bagidinigaaden gidoojibii'igewin mii dash
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Gaawiin-zhichigaazod gemaa gaa-giizhikaazod API gidinigaan ({provider}). Naanaagadawendan giin gidinigaan Settings-ing.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit gii-pi-ishkwaa ({provider}). Biindige-atoowi wiindamaw miinawaa nagishkaan.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Gaawiin internet-ing. Naanaagadawendan giin biminizha'igan miinawaa nagishkaan.
settings.reset_all_announce: Miinan Naanaagadawendamowin Gii-aabajitoon miinawaa Mazina'igan Gii-giiwenimaa.
about.what_body_2: Gakina gegoo ji-naawakaa — mewizha, mii dash miinawaa. Ingii-wii-ganawenimaa gaa-pi-izhi-wiindamaagoziyaan ji-naawakaamagak gaa-izhiwebiziwin, gaa-mamaajisidood, gaa-wiindamaagewin, miinawaa gaa-izhichigewin ji-aabajichigaazod ji-giiziibiigidoonameg. Ziigwebii'an o'ow mashkimoding WCAG-izhi-ozhibii'igaadegin, baabaapi'an gaa-wiindamawid, agaasiidomaa gemaa biminizha'an, mii dash giga-ozhibii'aan chi-mashkimoding audit ozhibii'iganeng.
error.announce: Gegoo gii-pi-izhi-maazhichigem. Gaa-pi-miskamang mazina'igan gaawiin gii-pi-onjibiindaakojigeziig. Naanaagadawendan gii-pi-izhi-bimaadizid miinawaa mii dash giin aabijitoon.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Adoopinan gaa-izhichigewin miinawaa gaa-wawindamaagoziwin gitigaaziwin apiitendaagozid
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Biinaa'an gaa-izhichigewin miinawaa gaa-wawindamaagoziwin gitigaaziwin gaa-pi-izhi-aabajichigaadeg
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Biindaakoziwin gigizhiimaaganag gaa-maajii'aajig miinawaa gaa-aatoojig wiindamaagewinan. Giin ginwaamaagoziwin gaawiin giiwitaashkigaazosiimin, gaawiin mazina'iganan, gaawiin wiisagenimowisiinan.
onboarding.heading: Biindigen A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Gaawiin ogii-takosiisiin wiidookaazowin. Giibiigan noongom miinawaa baakijigan?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Wiindamaw gaa-waabandaman: inaabiwin mazina'igan, aaniish ge-inaang, gemaa WCAG gaa-piindaakooziid. Aabaj Platform miinawaa WCAG Level gaa-naazitooyin ji-biminizha'aman mashkimod. Aabaj Narrow Results ji-wanenimaman gaa-bimaakowebinigaadeg. Oshki-wiindamaagewinan biminizha'igaadewag wenizhishing, gaye aapiji gashkitoowiziyang.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Aabaj Rank Up/Down ji-mamaanjiwebinaman oshki-wiindamaagewinan. Anama'e mazina'igan ji-maamiminjiminigaazod. Pagidinaan mazina'igan ji-aabajitooyan imaa gaa-kina maajiishkaamagak.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Zagaswe'an mazina'igan waabaндamaang owe ezhi-wiindamaagozid, WCAG mazinaakizon, gaa-pi-izhi-bimaadizid, miinawaa gaa-pi-izhi-aabajichigaazod. Ozhitoon ishkonigan mazina'iganing (gaa-enind 'Global:'). Aabajitoon AI Assist mazina'igan wiindamaagewin gaa-ozhitooyamban, mii dash gidaa-biminizha'an akiins gemaa Copy All aabajitoon miijiminan.
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: Native mazina'igan gaawiin mino-waawindamaagosii mii dash web.
search.hint_ranking: Aabaj Rank Up/Down ji-aanjitooyan aaniin waa-izhi-wiindamaagozid. Anama'e mazina'igan ji-maamiminjiminigaazod.
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Bimibatoo narrow wiiyaanabi miinawaa giiwe gaa-izhi-naazikaman
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 gaa-biminaakwenimigaazod miinawaa maamiminjiminigaado ishkweyaang gaa-takosinig oshki-wiindamaagewinan.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} ga-archived-ing mii dash apii bagijigaazowag mewizha aazhiidaabiiginigaazowag.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Mii dash da-waabandaagozid bezhig odapinaagan omaa pezhigw ininaabiiginiganan.
results.sort_live_hint: Live Search bimaadzii. Odapinaaganan da-aanjiwebiziwag apii gaa-ozhibii'igeyan gemaa gaa-aanjitooyan.
results.sort_smart_info: Smart bimaajina'igewin ozhaawashkozi Severity niigaan, mii dash giin gechi-pi-izhi-ozhitooyan bimaajina'igewin. Waawaabiganed-ojiins apii niigaan waabandaagozid; Archived apii ishkweyaang waabandaagozid. Mii dash gaa-pi-izhiwebak bimaajina'igewin.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA mazinaajimowinan bangii-tipaajimowin omaa mazina'iganing. Gaawiin misa AAA odapinaaganan waabandaagozisiinog, aaniin dash AAA-izhinikaazojig mii eta mino-izhichigewin gaa-pi-izhi-wiindamaagozid, gaawiin dash gichi-pi-aabajitaasiiwag.
results.sort_popularity_info: Mii dazhiikamang miinawaa gaa-pi-izhiwebak, akiing gichi-pi-gikenimind da-waabandaagozid aabajitoowin onji. Noongom, gichi-pi-gikenimind eta omaa biboonikewin da-pi-maajii'igod gaawiin dash da-wiijiiwind aaniin biindaakonan.
results.rank_hint: Bimaajina'an odapinaaganan da-aanji-bimaajinaagoziwag. Waawaabiganed-ojiins niigaan da-waabandaagozid. Archived gaagige-ganawenimind. (Giin da-aana'an.)
results.unpin_from_search: Owe odapinaagan pinned. Unpin da-biindaabi odapinaaganing.
detail.discard_confirm_body: Maajiishing ozhibii'igewin ga-nagadanaan gaa-biinjibiishaag mazina'igan miinawaa gaawiin ogii-akinoomaasiiwaan waawiindamaagewinan.
detail.ai_revision_hint: Aabajitoong ozhaawashkwaa-biisikiiganan biindigenan gaa-ani-aanzibiiyaan, biindigenan gidayaakoziwin omaa, mii AI ga-aanzibiiyaad omaa ozhibii'iganan. Bazikaang AI model gemaa biizikamid, izhaad
detail.finding_note_hint: Biindigenan omaa mamaandaawizi: endaayang, chi-aanzibiiyaan mazina'iganan, gemaa gaawiin wiindamaagewin. Gabeshimodan AI Wiidookaazowin
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: e.g. omaa dash waaboozid mobile, odaapinamaan tooltip
detail.finding_note_placeholder: e.g. Chi-aanzibiiyaan, gii-miskaamagad gakinaa Onboarding akiing. Apiitendaagozid chi-aanzibiiyaan ga-waabandaagozi maajiishing.
detail.ai_revision_aria: Akinaan AI giigidowinan miinawaa aanzibiiyaan gaa-ozhibii'igaazod
detail.ai_revision_error_body: Aaniin gegoo gii-maajiitaamagad aanzibiiyaang. Gimiwanaanan Akinaan & Aanzibiiyaan Gaa-Ozhibii'igaazod aabiji-giigidowin.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: Gaawiin odaa-ozhiigaanziin gemaa gii-ozhaabishkizid API ikidowin ({provider}). Waabamaag gidikidowinan Settings.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Gaawiin internet ikitosiig. Waabamaag gidikitowin miinawaa aabiji-giigidow.
help.take_tour_description: Onboarding wayeshkad gaagigidowin giizhiitaawin ji-waabandaman aaniin ezhi-anokiid A11yFred.
help.step_1_body: Oshkibimaadiziiwinan giizhibiziwag gaa-ozhibii'aman. Anokii Platform filter Settings azhigwa ji-agoodooyan Web gemaa Native App oshkibimaadiziiwinan (mihawaa web-wiijiindaasoowin). Anokii +mazina'igan ji-pi-wiindang aana'amaawin miinawaa -mazina'igan ji-biminizha'ang (e.g. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Miinaawaa gaa-izhi-nandawindamaading azhigwa Rank Up miinawaa Rank Down doodoowiganan ji-wanenimaasoyan. Star ji-azhigookiiyin ji-nagadamaading ishkweyaang. Pin azhigoozid ji-azhigookiiying ishkweyaang akiwenzii naanaagadawindamaading.
help.step_3_body: Agoodoon gaa-miizhid oshkibimaadiziiwin gaa-waabandaman. Oshkibimaadiziiwinan izhi-biziindaagoziwag aaniin ezhi-wiijiindaasoying ishkweyaang, mii dash gichi-ayaawining.
help.step_4_body: Ozhitoon ishkonigan mazina'iganing (gaa-enind 'Global:' gemaa 'Cart:'). Mii dash AI Assist aabajichigaazod, ozhibii'an gidodenimowinan Revision Notes ozhibii'iganing mii dash AI gaa-pi-aano-ozhibii'ang mazina'igan gidaa-pinaakobiton.
help.step_5_body: Maajiigin wiindamaagewin miinawaa gaa-pi-miinigooyan gii-oshki-ozhibii'igeng gemaa odaminowin. Anokii Copy All ji-maajiiginamaading niizh miinigoowinan waabishkizi.
help.shortcuts_note: Ode'imaanan mii eta go azhigookiid gaa-izhi-wiijiindaasod oshkibimaadiziiwinan. Anokii ji-biminizha'aman miinawaa ji-nandawindamaading oshkibimaadiziiwinan ji-azhigookiiyaan.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Mii ezhi-bi-giizhibaabatood oshkibimaadiziiwinan akiing. Owe mazina'igan azhigwa gidebwewinan ji-wiijiindaasoying gaa-ozhiitaawin ji-aazhitooyan wiindamaagewin miinawaa ji-oshki-ozhibii'igeng. Mazina'iganing gii-ozhiitaa gaa-anokiiwin noongo, mii dash AI gii-pi-giizhibaa'an ji-wiindamaagewin, ji-wiijiindaasoying, miinawaa gaa-nandawindamaading
about.feature_agentic_body: Giishpin Claude (Anthropic) pi-anokiid, gidaa-azhigookii Match Existing Style. AI ga-naanaagadawendaan gii-pi-oshki-ozhibii'igewin ji-wiijiindaasoying gaa-pi-izhi-ozhibii'igeng miinawaa gichi-ayaawining gaa-ozhibii'igeng, gaawiin eta go oshkibimaadiziiwin waabishkizi.
settings.party_confirm_body: Gaa-pi-izhi-biminizha'ang mii gaa-pi-izhi-maazhi'aawin miinawaa gaawiin wiijiindaasowin.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Owe ikidowin AI gii-oshki-ozhibii'igaade miinawaa gaawiin Rohingya ikidowinan gii-naanaagadawendaagwaziiwan.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya anishinaabeg gii-pi-maazhi'aawin miinawaa gii-pi-biminizha'aawin. Anokii owe ikidowin ji-wiijiindaasoying, miinawaa naanaagadawendan ji-wiijiindaasonan giishpin gidaa-izhichigeyan.
settings.platform_all_desc: Waabandan akina oshkibimaadiziiwinan web, native apps, miinawaa mazina'iganing.
settings.starred_results_desc: Anang-ozhibii'igaazod bizhiw endazhiid maajii-izhaad ishpiming, daa-pi-izhi-anang-ozhibii'igaazod.
settings.rankings_desc: Ishpiming miinawaa niisiming gaa-pi-izhi-miinigooziyan miinan. Aanind miina ishpiming gii-pi-izhi-miinigoozid giiyabi wiibad waabandaagozi nanda-giigidowinan.
